column1: **FIGURE 2 | Remaining litter biomass (%) at the end of a 6-month decomposition experiment, preceded by photodegradation in the field.** Samples from the field experiment are shown by open (UV+) or filled symbols (UV-). The laboratory experiment included irrigation treatments representing years with contrasting annual rainfall. Irrigation treatments represented the equivalent rainfall of a dry year (~15 mm), an average year (140 mm) and wet (El Nino) year (240 mm) in semiarid Chile. The experiment was conducted under constant temperature (23C). **(A)** Remaining litter biomass *Proustia* and **(B)** *Porlieria*. Data are means +- 1 SE.
